creator: alk@East.Sun.COM
text:
/usr/sbin/ppp provides a means of taking a configurable
	action when a link comes up, but not when a link goes down.
	Incidentally, I submitted this in the past but did not
 	receive back a tracking number, so I must've goofed somehow.

Fix: cvs diff: Diffing .
How-To-Repeat: 
	Hang up the phone :-)
